title: Agent Runner Loop (Core Turn Cycle)
activity_flow: START: agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40)
BUILD initial messages: [{role:system, content:system_prompt}, {role:user, content:initial_user_content or user_input}]
CONDITION: if turn % 10 == 0 → reset client.last_tools = '' (avoid context bloat)
[verbose=True]  → yield from response_gen → response; yield newline
CONDITION: if response.tool_calls is None → tool_calls = [{'tool_name':'no_tool','args':{}}]
ELSE → parse each tc: {tool_name, args (JSON-parsed), id}
FOR each tool_call (ii, tc) in tool_calls:
ELSE → yield tool name + args display (verbose or compact)
CALL handler.dispatch(tool_name, args, response, index=ii) → generator gen
CONDITION: outcome.should_exit == True → exit_reason = {result:'EXITED', data:outcome.data}; BREAK loop
CONDITION: outcome.next_prompt is falsy → exit_reason = {result:'CURRENT_TASK_DONE', data:outcome.data}; BREAK loop
CONDITION: outcome.next_prompt starts with '未知工具' → reset client.last_tools = ''
CONDITION: outcome.data is not None AND tool_name != 'no_tool' → append to tool_results
CONDITION: next_prompts is empty OR exit_reason:
IF handler._done_hooks is empty → BREAK main while loop (natural exit)
ELSE → pop handler._done_hooks[0] into next_prompts (continue via hook)
CALL handler.turn_end_callback(response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, joined_next_prompts, exit_reason) → next_prompt
CONDITION: exit_reason is set → call handler.turn_end_callback(..., '', exit_reason) (final notification)
dispatch_sub_flow: LOOK UP method: 'do_' + tool_name on handler
NOT FOUND + tool_name == 'bad_json' → return StepOutcome(None, next_prompt=args.get('msg','bad_json'), should_exit=False)
NOT FOUND (other) → yield '未知工具: <name>'; return StepOutcome(None, next_prompt='未知工具 <name>', should_exit=False)

key_data_structures.messages: List of {role, content, tool_results} — rebuilt each turn (history kept in Session object elsewhere
key_data_structures.tool_results: List of {tool_use_id, content (JSON string)} — passed back to LLM next turn
key_data_structures.next_prompts: set() — deduplicated prompts collected across tool calls; joined with \n for turn_end_callback

important_notes: agent_runner_loop is itself a generator — yields streaming text/status to caller
client.chat() is also a generator (streaming LLM output); exhaust() drains it non-verbosely
try_call_generator() in dispatch handles both regular functions and generators transparently
Every 10 turns, client.last_tools is reset to prevent context degradation
messages list is REPLACED each turn (not appended) — history managed externally by Session
handler._done_hooks allows deferred follow-up prompts after a natural exit
turn_end_callback can modify next_prompt (return value used, not the input)
verbose mode yields raw LLM stream + tool details; non-verbose mode yields compact summaries
